title: LLM Foundation
description: One direct model call that prints stop_reason and content blocks before any tool execution exists

steps.content: Use bash to print the current directory. Do not explain after the tool call.
steps.annotation: The user pushes one plain message into messages[]

steps.content:
client.messages.create(
  model=MODEL,
  system=SYSTEM,
  messages=history + [user_message],
  tools=[bash],
  max_tokens=2000,
)
steps.annotation: s00 makes one direct API call. No while loop yet.

steps.content: The assistant response body arrives as typed content blocks, not as magic runtime behavior.
steps.annotation: First thing to inspect: response.content[] is structured data
The model proposes a tool action by emitting a tool_use block with name + params

steps.content:
stop_reason: tool_use
content_blocks: 1

Block 1
[tool_use]
tool_name: bash
tool_params:
{
  "command": "pwd"
}
steps.annotation: s00 prints the raw reply shape: stop_reason, block type, tool name, and tool params

steps.content:
s00 stops here on purpose.
s01 is the chapter that executes the tool and appends tool_result.
steps.annotation: The harness observes the tool request but does not execute it yet
